div.p: Color Key: 🟢 Producer operations (writes head) 🔵 Consumer operations (writes tail) 🟡 Memory ordering (critical) 🔴 Constraints (must follow)

g.text: Ring Buffer Memory Layout (64-byte cache lines)

div.p: CPU: store entries[head] → store head Reordered: store head → store entries[head]
Consumer sees new head, reads garbage! With RELEASE barrier:
CPU: store entries[head] → BARRIER → store head Guaranteed: entry visible before head published
CPU: load head → BARRIER → load entries[tail] Guaranteed: see head before reading entry
Single Producer: Only ONE thread calls lf_ring_push Single Consumer: Only ONE thread calls lf_ring_pop Violation = Data Corruption

ul.li: Multiple consumers: duplicate entries For MPMC, use hardware atomics or different algorithm (e.g., Chase-Lev work-stealing deque)

text.tspan: // Entry MUST be visible before head!
// Entry MUST be visible before head!
